text: /voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_013 ドールズ管制機の出現を確認した！

/voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_020 管制機の上部にはコアがある。
そこが弱点だ。飛び乗る方法を探してくれ！

/voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_064 ドールズ管制機の撃墜を確認！
その調子で次も頼むぜ！

/voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_074 消耗した残敵が撤退。
……ドンマイ、次は全部倒そうぜ！

/voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_045 管制機の攻撃で、地表が熱くなってるな。
そこの気流で飛び上がれ！
/voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_020 There is a core in its upper part. That is its weak point. Find a way to get up there!
/voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_064 You felled the DOLLS Control System! I wish you just as much success with the next one!

/voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_074 The DOLLS Control System has retreated!
Don't worry. You'll get it next time!

/voice11_voice_navi003_trial_0001_045 The ground has become heated from the Control System's attacks.
Use the heat's updraft to jump your way up!
